title: lichen_l2.c:735 lichen_peer_remove NULL check redundant with nonnull
description: Contract violation: lichen_peer_remove() - Same issue as peer_add: __attribute__((nonnull)) at line 93-94 of header combined with NULL check at line 738. The nonnull attribute may cause compiler to optimize away the defensive check. HOW to fix: Remove __attribute__((nonnull)) from header to keep defensive NULL checking.
close_reason: Duplicate of project-LICHEN-d7ub.8 - same root cause (nonnull attribute conflicts with defensive NULL check)
